data.title: Trump Would 'Lead The Charge' To Scrap Debt Ceiling: 30-Year Treasury Bonds Slide To 2024 Lows, Stocks Cut Gains
data.description: Trump advocates for removal of US debt ceiling, causing bond market shock and tempering Wall Street gains. Uncertain how Congress will react.
